question: What are the Responsibilities of the HCP w/ HIPAA?
canonical_answer:
Must have a written privacy procedure (Notice of Privacy practices- this tells patients their rights to their own records, make copies, and request amendments to them)
•Must educate their staff on proper procedures for maintaining confidentiality
•HCP are permitted but not obligated to disclose confidential inform. For public health purposes
